ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "team_playing" TEXT /* Team that was playing (batting or bowling) */,
  "team_won" TEXT /* Team that won the match */,
  "form_difference" INTEGER /* Form difference between the two teams */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Normal, Tie, No Result) */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., Bat, Field) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Abandoned) */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "total_overs" INTEGER /* Total number of overs bowled in the match */,
  "total_balls" INTEGER /* Total number of balls bowled in the match */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the match */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the match */,
  "win_margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., 10 runs, 5 wickets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "ground_type" TEXT /* Type of ground (e.g., Grass, Artificial) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Typical climate conditions at the venue */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the venue in meters */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost */,
  "current_form" INTEGER /* Current form of the team (e.g., 1 for good, 0 for neutral, -1 for poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., Right-hand, Left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., Right-arm fast, Left-arm spinner) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position in the team (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the umpire represents */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total matches officiated by the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_scores" (
  "match_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match score entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "over_number" INTEGER /* Over number */,
  "ball_number" INTEGER /* Ball number in the over */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the ball */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken in the ball */,
  "batsman_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batsman */,
  "bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_batsman_id FOREIGN KEY ("batsman_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_bowler_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowler_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
